behaviors.description: Missing required key is reported with exact config path (e.g., `database.host`).
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is validation/message formatting logic on an already-loaded config object. MOCK-MISS: this behavior can fail inside one function that checks required keys and formats dotted paths. REAL-INFRA/LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Rejected higher levels because behavior text only requires message content for a missing key, not filesystem, subprocess, network, or model output.
behaviors.test_description: Call the validator with a config missing a required nested key and no env override map; assert the raised error includes the exact dotted path `database.host`.

behaviors.description: `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` changes config path resolution from `~/.config` to that directory.
behaviors.justification: Failure is at module handoff: env-reading + path-resolution + loader target path selection. MOCK-MISS: unit-testing only a helper could miss wiring bugs in loader startup. REAL-INFRA brake: no real network/subprocess needed; local filesystem/env is sufficient, so not System. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none.
behaviors.test_description: In a temp filesystem, set `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` to a temp dir containing `tool/config.yaml`, also place a different file under `~/.config/tool/config.yaml`; run loader startup and assert it reads from the XDG location.

behaviors.description: `TOOL_` environment variable overrides conflicting value in config file.
behaviors.justification: Bug appears when file parse output and env override mapping are merged; that is a cross-module boundary. Unit tests of merge logic alone may miss prefix parsing/key mapping handoff issues. REAL-INFRA: only local env/file needed, no OS-level external dependency beyond normal local IO; not System. No LLM dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Create config file with `database.host=filehost`, set `TOOL_DATABASE_HOST=envhost`, run full load/merge path, and assert effective value is `envhost`.

behaviors.description: YAML syntax errors include detected line number in error message.
behaviors.justification: Real failure boundary is loader error-wrapping around YAML parser exceptions. MOCK-HIDE: stubbing parser errors can miss real exception shape/line-number extraction. Rejected System because behavior text only requires parser line info from local config parsing, not subprocess/network/OS primitives. No LLM or multi-step agent pipeline.
behaviors.test_description: Write malformed YAML to a temp config file (known bad line), run loader, assert failure message contains the expected line number from parser diagnostics.

behaviors.description: If config directory is missing, loader creates it and writes defaults before proceeding.
behaviors.justification: This is filesystem side-effect orchestration across startup modules (existence check, mkdir, defaults write, continue load). Unit is too low because interaction among these steps is the failure mode. Integration-brake: local filesystem is enough; no subprocess/network. Rejected System since behavior text specifies local directory/file creation only.
behaviors.test_description: Start with empty temp HOME/XDG path with no config dir; run startup loader; assert directory now exists, defaults file exists with expected baseline keys, and loader proceeds without fatal error.
